title: Pass 5.D.5: ferrotorch-profiler cuda_timing tests silently skip on non-CUDA hosts
description:
Pass 4 finding (umbrella #982) — ferrotorch-profiler audit, TEST_INTEGRITY.

tests/cuda_timing_test.rs:28,57,106,139 — four tests use `let Some(c) = ctx() else { return };` so on a non-CUDA box they pass without exercising anything. Default `cargo test -p ferrotorch-profiler` reports green even though zero assertions ran.

Acceptance:
- Replace silent return with #[ignore = "requires CUDA"] OR runtime panic with skip-reason that surfaces in test output
- Mirror ferrotorch-gpu's HW-gating convention (which is auditable).
